creator.name: JS Party: JavaScript, CSS, Web Development
creator.handle: JS Party: JavaScript, CSS, Web Development

title: One last party
body_text: Jerod is joined by KBall, Nick & Amy to throw one last JS Party! We review last year's predictions, discuss the state of the web dev world, opine on coding AIs (of course) & divulge what comes next for the JS Party crew. Thank you for partying with us all these years! 💚
